历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 15770 → 17398 → 16787 → 17398 → 18532, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1745 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 18532; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 72 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 81 in 2023, 85 in 2024, and 93 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 103, an increase of about 10.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, reflecting the enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength; there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher in 2022, but the reputation has been stable in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th, rated as "average", with no significant viral boost to attention; no record of gaps in application files; four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grass Science—are rated A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering remain highly sought after, but the university is primarily focused on agriculture and forestry, with limited enrollment in popular engineering majors; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 347,000 in 2026 (+68.5%), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 10.8% in 2026 but a substantial increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+8.4% to 347,000), and the steady improvement in school ranking, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 18532; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19100, with a range of 18600–19600.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher occurred in 2022, but reputation has been stable in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th, rated as 'average', with no obvious viral content boosting attention; four disciplines (Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, Grass Science) received A- ratings, but History Category enrollment majors are mainly in humanities and law, with low correlation to the university's agricultural strengths.
